item.title: A 22.4% Year-to-Date Decline Pushes Highway Infrastructure Ltd to Its Weakest Level Ever
item.description: Despite recent improvements in profitability, Highway Infrastructure Ltd has slid to a fresh all-time low of Rs 45.42 on 27 Mar 2026, extending its downward trajectory amid broader sector weakness. Time: 4 minutes ago

item.title: A 49.1% Year-to-Date Decline Pushes Sapphire Foods India Ltd to Its Weakest Level Ever
item.description: The pace of decline in Sapphire Foods India Ltd has accelerated sharply, with the stock hitting a fresh all-time low of Rs 153.35 on 27 Mar 2026, marking a 49.1% drop year-to-date and a near 58.4% fall from its 52-week high. This steep slide comes amid a backdrop of weak long-term fundamentals and a challenging valuation landscape. Time: 10 minutes ago

item.title: Markets Rise, But Elin Electronics Ltd Slides to All-Time Low Amid Stock-Specific Sell-Off
item.description: Elin Electronics Ltd’s share price has declined to an all-time low of ₹102.60 on 27 Mar 2026, marking a significant milestone in the company’s ongoing market performance challenges. The stock’s fall comes amid sustained underperformance relative to key benchmarks and sector peers, reflecting a complex financial and technical landscape. Time: 14 minutes ago

item.title: Add-Shop E-Retail Ltd Breaches 52-Week Low, Touches New All-Time Low at Rs 6.62
item.description: The stock of Add-Shop E-Retail Ltd has reached a fresh all-time low of Rs 6.62 on 27 Mar 2026, marking a continuation of a prolonged downtrend that has seen the share price decline sharply over multiple time frames. Time: 15 minutes ago

item.title: Lodha Developers Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure on 27 Mar 2026
item.description: Lodha Developers Ltd experienced a notable decline today, touching an intraday low of Rs 708, marking a fresh 52-week low as the stock faced significant price pressure amid broader market weakness and sector underperformance. Time: 16 minutes ago

item.title: HDFC Asset Management Company Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure
item.description: Shares of HDFC Asset Management Company Ltd declined sharply on 27 Mar 2026, hitting an intraday low of Rs 2301.2, reflecting a 3.58% drop as the stock underperformed its sector and broader market amid prevailing bearish sentiment. Time: 16 minutes ago

item.title: ABB India Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure on 27 Mar 2026
item.description: Shares of ABB India Ltd declined sharply on 27 Mar 2026, hitting an intraday low of Rs 6,030.25 as the stock underperformed its sector and broader market amid widespread selling pressure and negative market sentiment. Time: 16 minutes ago

item.title: Markets Rise, But GK Energy Ltd Slides to All-Time Low Amid Stock-Specific Sell-Off
item.description: Despite a generally positive market environment, GK Energy Ltd has succumbed to a sharp decline, hitting its all-time low of Rs 96.20 on 27 Mar 2026. The stock’s recent performance starkly contrasts with broader indices, underscoring a pronounced divergence that demands closer scrutiny. Time: 18 minutes ago

item.title: Markets Rise, But Ajax Engineering Ltd Slides to All-Time Low Amid Stock-Specific Sell-Off
item.description: Ajax Engineering Ltd’s share price reached an all-time low on 27 March 2026, marking a significant milestone in the stock’s ongoing decline. The company’s shares closed at Rs 449.05, just 0.18% above its 52-week low, reflecting persistent downward pressure amid a challenging market environment and subdued financial performance. Time: 19 minutes ago

item.title: Markets Rise, But Meghmani Organics Ltd Slides to All-Time Low Amid Stock-Specific Sell-Off
item.description: Despite a broadly positive market environment, Meghmani Organics Ltd has continued its downward trajectory, hitting an all-time low of Rs 40.12 on 27 Mar 2026. This latest dip extends the stock’s underperformance, with a year-to-date decline of 37.39%, significantly lagging the Sensex’s 12.88% fall over the same period. Time: 19 minutes ago

item.title: Fairchem Organics Ltd Extends Losing Streak, Hits New All-Time Low
item.description: Fairchem Organics Ltd’s share price declined to an all-time low on 27 March 2026, marking a significant milestone in the company’s ongoing market performance struggles. The stock closed near its 52-week low, reflecting sustained downward pressure amid a challenging financial backdrop and persistent underperformance relative to broader market indices and sector peers. Time: 20 minutes ago

item.title: Strong Momentum Meets Stretched Valuations as Jattashankar Industries Ltd Reaches All-Time High
item.description: Jattashankar Industries Ltd, a player in the Garments & Apparels sector, reached a significant milestone on 27 Mar 2026 as its stock price touched an all-time high of Rs.449.95. This achievement reflects a remarkable performance trajectory, with the stock outperforming its sector and broader market indices over multiple time frames. Time: 22 minutes ago
